LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MARK SANDFORD, MICHAEL HICKMAN, HOUSE OF SEVEN GABLES REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 19, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 11, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE DEMURRER AND OBJECTION TO OPPOSITION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

AMERICAN HOME REALTY NETWORK MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 11, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND OBJECTION TO OPPOSITION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs MARK SANDFORD, MICHAEL HICKMAN and HOUSE OF SEVEN GABLES REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. The Complaint is properly pled. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs MARK SANDFORD, MICHAEL HICKMAN and HOUSE OF SEVEN GABLES REAL ESTATE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS MARK SANDFORD, MICHAEL HICKMAN, HOUSE OF SEVEN GABLES REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to December 19, 2012 to give American Home Realty Network the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. American Home Realty Network must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 11, 2012 at 4 pm, or the demurrer will be sustained. The court has courtesy copies of the demurrer and objection to opposition. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS MARK SANDFORD, MICHAEL HICKMAN, HOUSE OF SEVEN GABLES REAL ESTATE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to December 19, 2012 to give American Home Realty Network the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. American Home Realty Network must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 11, 2012 at 4 pm, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers and objection to opposition. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
